title: Elbaf Reveals Its Giants
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Franky, Usopp, Unknown person #3, Road as Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.
scene: Elbaf’s villages, giant society, Loki’s imprisonment, and the island’s political danger come into focus as the Straw Hats reunite with old allies and new threats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Listen up, Warriors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're Callin' Off the Search!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We ain't found squat after all this searching!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But I'm sure it'll be fine!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can bet your ass they're alive!! Thanks for lookin' though!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right... we'll just wait for them on Elbaf. They'll make their way there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, we've done all we can. Even my shark network is worn out. We appreciate your efforts.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're also out of food. Let's not starve ourselves to death.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I see..

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm sure it'll be fine if their crew says so.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's decided! Set course for Elbaf, ya slimy oafs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: YEA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Let's toast our home- coming!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But boss, we're out of food and booze! Gahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Huge!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Check out this tree!! It's gotta be thousands of years old, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: merowl

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's not just that one!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: They're all so big!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's Frickin' cold here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is this a mountain?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Look! There's a super long rope bridge!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This place is so vast, it's making me dizzy!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Giants are crossing the bridge! Hide!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: (Reak

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I don't get hajrudin! Why'd he let...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hoot!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...that crackpot join the crew in the first place?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: @Reak...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's 'cause he's a skilled Navigator.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't stand him! They may call 10k! "The shame of Elbaf," but he deserves that title even more!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Degya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya Gya

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Road probably wouldn't mind you calling him that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You're sure of what you saw, Piper?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His Crow was carrying a small ship, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hoot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We're meant to arrest intruders...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Road keeps smuggling in intruders of his own!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Opens through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
